name: Settings - Unauthenticated user sees login prompt
description: When an unauthenticated user navigates to /settings, the page shows a login prompt or redirects to login instead of showing the API token management interface.

planSteps.description: Navigate directly to https://mantiz-wine.vercel.app/settings without any authentication
The page shows a message requiring GitHub sign-in or a login button — the API Tokens management section is NOT accessible without logging in
